name: compliance closed-loop step audit-pack assembles the bundle including AIBOM and evidence sections
command: mkdir -p compliance && : > compliance/audit.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-test.sh" --step audit-pack --audit-log compliance/audit.log --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'section=aibom' out.txt && grep -q 'section=evidence' out.txt && grep -q 'section=risk-classification' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
